headline: 5G Rollout Covers Only 42% After 4 Years of Deployment
context: DNB 5G network reached 42% population coverage by end 2025 far short of 80% target set at 2021 launch.

cards.big: 5G coverage at only 42% of population 4 years after 2021 launch
cards.sub: Original 80% target missed by wide margin despite RM16 billion investment

cards.big: DNB deployed 8,200 of planned 14,000 5G towers by December 2025
cards.sub: Tower deployment slowed by state approval delays and community objections

cards.big: Second 5G network operator licensed 2024 covered only 12% of population
cards.sub: Dual network approach adds RM4 billion in duplicated infrastructure costs

cards.big: Average 5G speed in Malaysia of 320 Mbps ranks 8th among 10 ASEAN nations
cards.sub: South Korea and Singapore exceed 800 Mbps while Malaysia prioritized coverage

cards.big: 5G delays test whether telecoms infrastructure can meet digital economy ambitions
42% coverage after 4 years — 5G rollout reveals that spectrum allocation is not the same as deployment.
